title: Business Development Manager
description:
As a Business Development Manager, you will be responsible for defining and executing strategic growth initiatives with the accounts assigned to you. This involves identifying new technologies opportunities, cultivating long-term relationships with existing or new clients/partners, and collaborating with internal cross-functional teams to drive revenue and expand our market presence and wallet share.  

Key responsibilities:

Market Intelligence 

  • Monitor competitive landscape, pricing trends, and customer needs to inform strategy. 
  • Develop and implement strategic business plans with identified key partners to achieve company growth targets. 

Stakeholder Engagement and Enablement

  • Develop strong relationships with key vendors and customers. 
  • Deliver training, sales tools, and support to partners for successful go-to-market execution. 

Sales and lead generation

  • Generate new sales leads and convert them into successful business opportunities. 
  • Prepare persuasive business proposals, presentations, and sales collateral. 
  • Track, negotiate and close pipelines conscientiously that meet company guidelines and support revenue growth.  

Internal collaboration

  • Work closely with internal marketing, technical, and product teams to create tailored strategies that address client needs and market demands. 
  • Provide feedback to internal teams to help improve products and service offerings. 

Performance tracking and analysis

  • Monitor business development activities and analyse key performance metrics and sales data. 
  • Report on performance and adjust strategies as necessary to ensure goals are met.  

Required skills and qualifications 

  • Min. Diploma or Bachelor's degree in Business Administration, Marketing, or a related field. 
  • Proven min. 3 years of experience in business development, sales, or a similar commercial role in IT Technology field 
  • Excellent communication, negotiation, presentation and interpersonal skills. 
  • Strong strategic and analytical thinking skills, with the ability to problem solving, research and interpret market dynamics. 
  • Self-motivated and results-oriented with strong project management and organizational abilities. 
  • Proficiency with CRM software and other business productivity tools.  
  • Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a fast-paced environment. 
  • Strong understanding of enterprise IT technologies and project-based selling.

postedCompany.description:
WE ARE the world's largest provider of technology products and services. As a highly respected Fortune 100 company and a valued partner fro more than 1400 vendors, and 200,000 resellers in 39 countries - we are truly one of the world's great global brands.

Ingram Micro Asia Limited, (a wholly owned subsidiary of Ingram Micro Inc.) headquartered in Singapore, is a leading wholesale provider of a wide range of computer products in Asia Pacific. Today, we represent more than 90 vendors in Asia Pacific with more than 24,000 products including Application Software, Systems, Networking, Storage, Printers and Peripherals products.

If you are looking to be part of a journey, where passionate people achieve together, then you are home!

This is why we came. This is why we stay.
postedCompany.name: INGRAM MICRO ASIA PTE. LTD.
